allow: Bash(createdb -h localhost -U postgres devos 2>&1 || psql -h localhost -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE devos;" 2>&1)
Bash(export PGPASSWORD="" && "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE devos;" 2>&1)
Bash(net stop postgresql-x-16 && net start postgresql-x-16 2>&1)
Bash(net stop postgresql-x64-16 && net start postgresql-x64-16 2>&1)
